title: Lab 33: Bootloader Kernel Argument
description: Modify the system bootloader so every installed kernel boots with the required persistent argument

tasks: Configure the bootloader on clientvm so that every installed kernel boots with the kernel argument audit=1.
The change must persist across reboots and must not require manual GRUB editing during startup.
hints: Use a persistent bootloader tool rather than a one-time edit at the GRUB menu.
Verify the configured kernel arguments for all installed kernels.
solution_outline: Use grubby to update all installed kernels.
